source.name: Level 1:Lab 5.1 - Exploring the Configuration Files - LLM Model Identification
source.instructions: **What LLM model id is configured for this agent?** (Check **`endpoints.yml`** under **`model_groups`** → **`model:`**.)
source.learningObjectives: SWBAT identify the LLM model id configured in endpoints.yml (model_groups)
source.guidance: In **`endpoints.yml`**, under **`model_groups`**, the **`model:`** field is **`rasa/command-generator-llama-3.1-8b-instruct`** (Rasa tutorial provider at **`https://tutorial-llm.rasa.ai`**). That is the LLM id used for this agent’s configured model group.
